---
title: "Statistical Geography"
subtitle: "Quantitative methods, spatial statistics, and data analysis for geographic research."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---



Welcome to the **Statistical Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course covers the quantitative and statistical techniques essential for rigorous geographic research — from basic descriptive statistics to advanced spatial modeling.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Sources of Geographic Information and Data (spatial and non-spatial).**
* **Types of Maps, Techniques of Map Making (Choropleth, Isarithmic, Dasymetric, Chorochromatic, Flow Maps) Data Representation on Maps (Pie diagrams, Bar diagrams and Line Graph).**
* **Applications of Measures of Central Tendency, Dispersion and Inequalities, Sampling, Sampling Procedure and Hypothesis Testing (chi square test, t test, ANOVA).**
* **Time Series Analysis, Correlation and Regression Analysis.**
* **Measurement of Indices, Making Indicators Scale Free, Computation of Composite Index, Principal Component Analysis and Cluster Analysis.**
* **Morphometric Analysis: Ordering of Streams, Bifurcation Ratio, Drainage Density and Drainage Frequency, Basin Circularity Ratio and Form Factor, Profiles, Slope Analysis, Clinographic Curve, Hypsographic Curve and Altimetric Frequency Graph.**

---

{{< include statistical-geography/01-data-sources-and-types.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/02-statistical-diagrams.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/03-frequency-distribution-and-cumulative-frequency.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/04-measures-of-central-tendency.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/05-class-intervals-for-mapping.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/06-measures-of-dispersion-and-concentration.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/07-standard-deviation.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/08-lorenz-curve.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/09-measuring-association-among-attributes.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/10-correlation-simple-and-multiple.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/11-measurement-of-spatial-patterns-nearest-neighbour-analysis.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/12-scaling-techniques-rank-score-weighted-score.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/13-sampling-techniques-for-geographical-analysis.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/14-cartographic-graphical-methods.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/15-correlation-regression.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/16-course-content.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/17-descriptive-statistics.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/18-inferential-statistics.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/19-probability-sampling.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/20-spatial-statistics.md >}}
